purpose: Apply cross-LLM-style web_search reformulation gate to non-quarantined candidates. Per spec R2, >=5 web_search reformulations per non-quarantined candidate. ANY collision (arXiv match, blog match, product match) -> REJECT.
gate_trigger_rule: Run 11 recheck: gate triggers on candidates that BOTH (a) clear threshold 0.90 AND (b) survive quarantine. Since 0/24 Run 11 survivors clear 0.90, formal verify gate is not triggered. Diagnostic verifies performed on top 3 non-quarantined candidates to demonstrate the gate would have caught them if their composite had reached threshold.
